error_signature: invalid input syntax for type uuid: "undefined"
title: Invalid UUID input in CollaborationService
symptom: Logs show an error indicating 'invalid input syntax for type uuid: "undefined"' when handling messages in the CollaborationService.
not_this_if: No errors related to UUID input in logs
root_cause: The error occurs when the system attempts to process a message with an undefined UUID, likely due to a failure in the workflow execution that prevents proper data handling.
fix_steps: Investigate the source of the undefined UUID in your workflows.
Ensure that all necessary data is correctly passed and available for processing.
agent_instruction: Check your workflows for missing or undefined UUIDs and correct them.
